assertionResults.title: Relay disconnect mid-sign yields a real failure (not a hang)

steps.expected: Pending sign transitions to timeout/disconnect failure within runtime timeout bound and SigningFailedModal opens
steps.observed: request_id dc28e52ce9a824b14f79231be5b763d4 failed with code=timeout message='locked peer response timeout' in 29.6s, modal opened, relayHistory recorded close code 1006

assertionResults.title: Tab backgrounding does not drop in-flight ops

steps.action: Dispatch sign, simulate hidden->visible via visibilityState override + visibilitychange events, keep tab hidden for 21s
steps.expected: Hidden transition is logged and op settles without manual recovery on foreground return
steps.observed: visibilityHistory recorded visible->hidden->visible; request_id cb2991a4e4bc679e6f4668194ac3e7ea completed successfully without manual action

evidence.network: Relay remained configured at ws://127.0.0.1:8194 during hidden-window simulation

assertionResults.title: Relay reconnect correlates completions back to original request_ids

steps.action: Dispatch sign, force relay drop, restore relay, wait for settlement
steps.expected: Post-reconnect completion maps to original request_id and no unknown completion ids are introduced in this window
steps.observed: dispatch request_id 841be771ee8df7f7a92e1d2f97d47f0a completed after reconnect; relayHistory captured close/open; unknownNewIds=[]

evidence.network: __debug.relayHistory delta captured close(1006) then open; runtimeRelays reconnectCount incremented

assertionResults.title: Nonce-pool 'Trigger Sync' overlay surfaces during refill

steps.expected: Syncing nonces / Trigger Sync overlay appears while depleted and clears after restore
steps.observed: noncePoolSnapshot reflected depletion override, but overlay text did not render in this run; restore cleared snapshot without an observable overlay cycle

assertionResults.issues: DEV nonce-depletion hook updated snapshot state but did not surface the expected Syncing nonces/Trigger Sync overlay in this execution context.

assertionResults.title: All OPS surfaces are keyboard reachable

steps.action: Tab from Refresh peers through OPS controls and capture focused-element trace
steps.expected: Refresh peers, Test Sign, Test ECDH, Ping, Refresh All all appear in tab-order with visible focus
steps.observed: Tab trace reached Message input, Test Sign, ECDH input, Test ECDH, Ping input; Ping and Refresh All buttons were disabled and not reached as activatable controls

Enter on Test Sign produced request_id b77f0d4e948a09e19fd2664141bf2456 with completion; Enter on Refresh peers produced ping activity; Space on Test ECDH did not yield an observable ECDH completion in this sample

evidence.network: Relay connected at ws://127.0.0.1:8194; keyboard validation focused on dispatch observables

assertionResults.issues: Ping and Refresh All remained disabled in this run, so full OPS keyboard reachability/activation contract was not met.

assertionResults.title: Window close cleans up pending OPS state

steps.action: Dispatch sign, close active dashboard tab, reopen app and return to dashboard
steps.expected: Closed-session request_id is absent after reopen and WS close-frame evidence is observable
steps.observed: request_id 297d859e0d73d5b61cc2c40016ac50b5 was dispatched before close; after reopen pending_operations was empty, but relay close-frame telemetry from the closed tab was not recoverable

evidence.network: Post-reopen runtimeRelays/relayHistory were empty; required close-code evidence (1000/1001) was not available from closed-tab context

assertionResults.issues: Pending cleanup was observed, but websocket close-frame evidence could not be captured after tab closure with available hooks/tooling.

frictions.description: OPS sign pending rows are often too transient to remain visible in runtime_status snapshots even when requestId is returned from dispatch.
frictions.resolution: Used requestId-return correlation + completion/failure snapshots for deterministic evidence.

frictions.description: Dashboard banner noise (non-sign failure notices) can enter the tab-order ahead of OPS controls.
frictions.resolution: Captured explicit tab trace and continued focus traversal from Refresh peers into OPS controls.

blockers.description: Closed-tab websocket close telemetry is not recoverable after tab termination in this run; post-reopen debug history was empty.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Captured pre-close relay state, performed tab-close + reopen cycle, and inspected post-reopen __debug.relayHistory/runtimeRelays; close-frame code still unavailable.
